on_screen_text:
English bolne me darr lagta hai? galat bol denge is darr se chinta ho rahi hai? [Are you afraid of speaking English? Are you worried about speaking it incorrectly?]
लीजिए Mysivi App! [Get the Mysivi App!]
यहाँ AI Teacher के साथ आप जब चाहें तब बात कर सकते हैं। [Here you can talk with an AI Teacher whenever you want.]
आपकी गलतियों को यह तुरंत सुधारकर सिखाता है। [It instantly corrects your mistakes and teaches you.]
बस इतना ही नहीं, आपकी तरह ही सीख रहे दूसरे लोगों के साथ मिलकर बात करके आप Practice भी कर सकते हैं! [Not just this, you can also practice by talking with other people who are learning just like you!]
इसमें मौजूद Learning Path के ज़रिए आप अपनी English को धीरे-धीरे बेहतर बना सकते हैं। [Through the Learning Path available in this, you can gradually improve your English.]
सिर्फ 1 रुपये में Trial शुरू करें! [Start your trial for just 1 Rupee!]
उसके बाद केवल 299 रुपये प्रति माह। आज ही Download करें! [After that, only 299 Rupees per month. Download today!]
summary: The ad targets individuals who are anxious about speaking English incorrectly, offering the Mysivi App as a supportive learning tool. It showcases features like an interactive AI teacher for instant corrections, peer-to-peer practice, and a structured learning path. The call to action promotes a trial for just 1 Rupee, followed by an affordable monthly subscription.
